retry_reason: Failure indicates the refcount was zero (object is dead/dying); retrying will not revive it.
contract_summary: Conditional get-wrapper that attempts to acquire a reference on a bpf_task_work_ctx by incrementing its refcount only if it is non-zero. Returns true on success, meaning the caller now holds a valid reference and must eventually release it via a corresponding put (e.g., bpf_task_work_ctx_put). If false is returned, the object is already in the process of being freed and must not be used. The caller must always check the return value before using the context.
